Your goal is to collect all 5 mystical orbs by aligning panels to create pathways, reveal hidden objects, and discover connections between scenes. The game features 5 progressive levels, each introducing new puzzle mechanics. Arrow Keys: Navigate between panels (4 panels in a 2x2 grid) Space: Interact with the selected panel (zoom in/out, activate connections) Shift: Swap the selected panel with another panel Z: Undo last action (limited uses) Enter: Start game Esc: Pause/Unpause R: Restart to main menu Testing basic panel navigation and interaction mechanics. Frame Within Frames

Frame Within Frames is a puzzle game where you manipulate interconnected panels to solve visual puzzles. Each panel can contain scenes that zoom in, zoom out, or reveal different perspectives. Your goal is to collect all 5 mystical orbs by aligning panels to create pathways, reveal hidden objects, and discover connections between scenes. The game features 5 progressive levels, each introducing new puzzle mechanics.

Controls: Arrow Keys: Navigate between panels | Space: Interact/Zoom | Shift: Swap panels | Z: Undo | Enter: Start | Esc: Pause | R: Restart

Frame Within Frames

Frame Within Frames is a puzzle game where you manipulate interconnected panels to solve visual puzzles. Each panel can contain scenes that zoom in, zoom out, or reveal different perspectives. Your goal is to collect all 5 mystical orbs by aligning panels to create pathways, reveal hidden objects, and discover connections between scenes. The game features 5 progressive levels, each introducing new puzzle mechanics.

Controls: Arrow Keys: Navigate between panels | Space: Interact/Zoom | Shift: Swap panels | Z: Undo | Enter: Start | Esc: Pause | R: Restart
